input:
Review these two shell utilities for portability issues:

```bash
backup_dir() {
  local src="$1"
  local dst="$2"
  local ts
  ts=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
  local archive="${dst}/backup_${ts}.tar.gz"
  mkdir -p "$dst"
  tar -czf "$archive" -C "$(dirname "$src")" "$(basename "$src")"
  echo "Backup created: $archive"
}
```

And the restore helper:

```bash
restore_dir() {
  local archive="$1"
  local dst="$2"
  if [ ! -f "$archive" ]; then
    echo "Error: archive not found: $archive" >&2
    return 1
  fi
  mkdir -p "$dst"
  tar -xzf "$archive" -C "$dst"
  echo "Restored to: $dst"
}
```
